hooks.command: node -e "const fs = require('fs'), path = require('path'), cp = require('child_process'); let home = process.env.USERPROFILE || process.env.HOME || ''; if (process.platform === 'linux' && home.startsWith('/home/')) { const user = process.env.USER || home.split('/').pop(); const wslHome = '/mnt/c/Users/' + user; if (fs.existsSync(wslHome)) home = wslHome; } const p = path.join(home, '.apra-fleet', 'hooks', 'post-register-member.sh'); if (fs.existsSync(p)) { cp.execSync('bash \"' + p + '\"', { stdio: 'inherit' }); }"
